headline: Managing Partner at OOH Capital and Director
summary:
Managing Partner OOH Capital
Director of the Women's Equality Party (WEP) and Chair of the Steering Group
Ex-Global President of Posterscope Worldwide.

experiences.title: Director and Chair of Steering Committee
Global President
experiences.description: Global President of Posterscope Worldwide with extensive experience around the world in OOH. Track record of building businesses, driving growth, transforming businesses, integrating acquisitions, leading and disrupting the sector. Experience of setting up the business in the UK and running the P&L for over 25 years.  Shadow P&L globally for over 15 years. Experience of building Posterscope global network from the start, through a combination of acquisitions and partnerships. -	Proven P&L operator -	Experience of working in a global organization -	Proven track record of building businesses
